name: durable-agent
title: Durable Agent
summary: Resumable multi-step agent loop on 0gkit-jobs — step ledger prevents re-running completed steps on restart, every executed step is traced via OpenTelemetry. Optional sealed-inference step is capability-guarded (runtime check, not a hard dep).

env.note: Jobs backend type (memory=in-process default; swap for redis or sqlite for persistence across restarts)
